alerts.headline: May 2026 Gold ETF Outflows: What the Data Reveals - Discovery Alert

alerts.headline: 🟡 ATH PULLBACK: Gold is 18.1% below its all-time high of $5,318 — historically a re-entry zone
alerts.detail: Gold set its ATH of $5,318 on 2026-01-29. Pullbacks of 8-20% below ATH have historically been strong accumulation opportunities in bull markets.
